title: Runtime Tokenization, Argument Validation, Registry Types, and Exhaustive Dispatch · Inference Brief: Pokedex Ts Command Runtime Narrowing
summary: The parser splits on literal spaces, casts the first token to a command union, lets missing arguments become undefined, and uses an untyped object whose prototype can affect lookup. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts command runtime narrowing increment in runtime-validated exhaustive command registry. Learners progress throu…
objectives: Narrow arbitrary strings against an own-key command registry instead of asserting they are CommandName.
Normalize line endings and allowed whitespace under a bounded documented grammar while retaining raw input only when needed.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
